ELPAC Level 1
Lexile ≥1400L
DTR · TALK ABOUT A SCENE

Eleven Locks the Door

STS-MS7-L1-1400P-MSMATH7-TTM-GBL-02 • MS Math Grade 7 • Multi-Step Equations and Inequalities
Look at the picture. You will answer some questions about it. Press the play button to hear each question. Record your answer for each question. You can listen to your answer and record it again. Click SUBMIT RECORDINGS when you have answered all the questions.
JUST FOR FUN · OPTIONAL
Every time-travel crew has to solve for the exact year before the machine will jump. Amara, Kenji, and Priya are the Chrono Command team, and today's mission lands them at a Lunar New Year parade, a market in Accra, and a temple in Kyoto, three stops around the world in one afternoon. To lock the first destination the mission computer needs 3x + 12 = 45 solved, and the teacher is holding the chronometer that will not start until the crew gets x right.
If x = 11 locks the destination, is the crew's fuel still in the safe range where 2x + 5 < 30? How do you know?
Optional. You do not have to record this one.
1
What is Amara doing?
Look at the picture. Identify Amara's action precisely in a single word.
2
What is Kenji holding?
Look at the picture. Identify the specific object Kenji holds.
3
What is the teacher doing?
Look at the picture. Identify precisely what the teacher holds up.
4
What room is this? How do you know?
Look at the picture. Identify the subject this room is used for.
5
Tell me about the mission board.
Look at the picture. Identify one specific element of the mission board.
6
What is Priya wearing?
Look at the picture. Identify the precise color Priya is wearing.
Record an answer for each question, then submit.
Content alignment: CCSS 7.EE.B.4 — Multi-Step Equations and Inequalities. ELD (Speaking — official ELPAC “Talk About a Scene”): PI.A.1, PII.B.3, PII.B.4, PII.B.5.
